name: Chocolate Surprise Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter until creamy.
2. Alternately add powdered sugar and cocoa to the butter mixture, followed by whipping cream and vanilla extract. Blend well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
3. Refrigerate the mixture until it is firm enough to handle.
4. Shape small amounts of the mixture around desired centers (such as after-dinner mints, whole candied cherries, whole almonds, or pecan/walnut halves).
5. Roll the shaped mixture into 1-inch balls and place them in a refrigerator until they are firm.
6. Coat each truffle by dropping it into the desired coating (powdered sugar, sweetened coconut flakes from MOUNDS brand, or chopped nuts). Turn the truffles until they are well covered with the coating.
7. Refrigerate until firm. Approximately 3 dozen truffles will be produced.
Variation: Add 1/2 teaspoon rum extract and decrease vanilla to 1 teaspoon for a different flavor profile.
